Configuration for JavaScript unit tests with dependencies and scripts for testing and linting.

# Purpose
The `package.json` file defines the metadata and configuration for a Node.js project named `pebble-pkjs-tests`. It specifies the project version as `1.0.0` and provides a description indicating that the project contains unit tests for `.js pkjs` assets. The `main` field points to `index.js` as the entry point of the project. The file lists `utf8` as a dependency and includes several development dependencies such as `eslint`, `mocha`, and `simple-mock` for code linting and testing purposes. The `scripts` section defines commands for running tests and linting the code, using `mocha` for testing and `eslint` for code quality checks. The file also includes placeholders for the author and specifies the license as belonging to Pebble Technology Corp.
